headline: Is Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BSX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Boston Scientific Corporation on Guardian Research’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BSX. Boston Scientific Corporation’s share was trading at $69.48 as of March 20th. BSX’s trailing and forward P/E were 35.81 and 20.12 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. headline: ISRG's Margins Contract in Q4: Will Tariffs Continue to Hurt in 2026?
summary: ISRG records 37% margins despite tariff pressure, using cost efficiencies and recurring revenue strength to offset headwinds and sustain profitability.
